title: symphyotrichum burgessii
intro: Symphyotrichum burgessii, also known as Burgess' aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-spasmodic properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy, often in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
